case_title: BENJAMIN POSSOLO VS. SAN FRANCISCO MOVERS, INCORPORATED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,071.00 FILED BY POSSOLO, BENJAMIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MOVERS, INCORPORATED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MOVERS, INCORPORATED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LOUIS CERVANTES--MANAGER OF SAN FRANCISCO MOVING COMPANY. NO COSTS, AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-17-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MOVERS, INCORPORATED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POSSOLO, BENJAMIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MOVERS, INCORPORATED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
